description: Pinned global tools installed or verified by the supported Linux bootstrap.

external_installers.policy: installer script remains source-pinned by URL only; checksum or locked binary provenance is not yet claimed

policy.version_drift_behavior: verify-only fails on drift; install mode may reinstall the pinned package through the single supported bootstrap; post-install mismatch fails
policy.certification_boundary: This manifest pins global npm package versions. It does not claim registry integrity, checksum verification, or vendor installer provenance.
